pr.title: Crystal Curriculum — TF-IDF curriculum learning by Bee Bytez

output.summary: Info-density Crystallizer oversamples TF-IDF scored batches, then linearly blend to uniform curriculum while scaling to 10 layers with Muon weight decay.
techniques: TF-IDF Crystallizer scoring of multiple candidate batches
Curriculum schedule decays to uniform sampling after 70%
Muon optimizer weight decay with 10-layer transformer
